context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 2
WINDOW: 126.833s to 163.667s (smile at 146.833s to 148.667s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[98.525-150.730] interviewee: I would not live. So my grandmother bundled me up and took me to her hometown. And I was a raised for almost four years by my grandparents. I didn't know my parents. They came from time to time to visit us. But there were other sisters and brothers who came. So I did not.
[150.730-155.646] interviewer: They are readjusting the lens.
[155.646-157.080] interviewer: OK, go.
[157.080-434.930] interviewee: In 1915, my parents moved from Austria to Germany.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
sisters and brothers

context_segments.speaker: interviewee
context_segments.text: In 1915, my parents moved from Austria to Germany.
